excluded_strategy_ids.daily539_f4cold_3bet: Generating adapter (lottery_api/models/p93_tierb_replay_adapters.py) carries an explicit module-level governance statement: 'These adapters ... must NOT be used for live prediction, strategy promotion, or production replay row insertion' and 'All rows generated using these adapters are dry_run=1, temp-DB only.' Existing production rows for this strategy_id were produced by a separate, explicitly authorized script (P94); reusing the adapter here for a new production write would need the same kind of explicit override, which is out of scope for this incremental task.
excluded_strategy_ids.daily539_f4cold_5bet: Same p93_tierb_replay_adapters.py governance restriction as daily539_f4cold_3bet above.
excluded_strategy_ids.daily539_markov_cold: Adapter's underlying tools/backtest_39lotto_comprehensive.py resolves its own default DB path relative to its own __file__ at import time (a known multi-sink DB-path-resolution pattern; the repo has 24+ such sinks per project history) and raises FileNotFoundError when imported from a git worktree that intentionally has no DB file checked out. This is an environment artifact, not a prediction-logic defect -- get_one_bet's own math only depends on the `history` argument. A symlink workaround was considered and rejected: it would create an unguarded default-path write route into the canonical DB, bypassing this task's manifested/transactional write path. Excluded from this run; a follow-up task should either run from an environment where the module's default path resolves, or fix the module to accept an explicit db_path override.

excluded_bet_indices.acb_markov_midfreq_3bet: p31a_wave1_retired_adapters.AcbMarkovMidfreq3BetAdapter is bet-1-only by design ('Replay records bet-1 only = pure ACB bet'); this matches how P31A/P31B originally scoped this strategy. Historical bet_index 2-3 rows for this strategy_id were generated by a separate module (p128_wave2_phase2_adapters.py) that is not present on origin/main (orphaned commit) -- not regenerated here.
excluded_bet_indices.daily539_f4cold: replay_strategy_registry._Daily539F4ColdAdapter.get_one_bet returns exactly one bet. Historical bet_index 2-3 rows for this strategy_id were produced by a mechanism not confirmed reusable within this task's scope -- not regenerated here.
